    G

    Guesser - Class in GuessGame
    Guesser - It takes input from guesser using Scanner class.

    GuesserGame - Class in GuessGame
    GuesserGame - A simple Guesser game.
    GuesserGame() - Constructor for class GuessGame.GuesserGame
     
    GuessGame - package GuessGame
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class GuessGame.GuesserGame
    In main method, the Umpire method is created as u and three methods is called from Umpire object.

    P

    Player - Class in GuessGame
    Player - Player class has logic of taking input from players using Scanner class.

    U

    Umpire - Class in GuessGame
    Umpire - The Umpire class controls the flow of the guessing game.
